A difficulty which 1t is feared
may embroil a thousand Spokane
union men has arisen over the Ia
Dor troubles in connection with the
Empire Ice company, which con.
Quoted skating rink on Sinto ave-
nue. between Elm and Oak streets
last winter.


J. H. Schaffer, manager of the
company has made statement in
regard to the trouble existing be-
tween his concern and the local
unions. The concern was placed
on the unfair list last winter by the
building trades council because of
trouble arising at the time the skat.
ing rink and ice plant were being
built. At this time the union must
clans had a contract to furnish
music at the rink.
